message:
Command `# Yosys in pipe_write state (blocked on logging). Let's check LibreLane state
ps -p 214817 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Look at all related processes
pgrep -f "librelane\|yosys\|openroad" | xargs ps -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan,comm -p 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code -1.
